name: Select Harvests Limited
analysis: SHV's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 24% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$3.9100, stop A$3.6700, target A$5.0254 (4.65:1) — then trail it.
